title: tropaeolaceae
intro: The Tropaeolaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. It is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the Nasturtium family. This family includes approximately 18 species of flowering plants, which are primarily native to the Americas but have been naturalized in other parts of the world. The Tropaeolaceae family is characterized by its brightly colored flowers and edible leaves, which are often used as a garnish in salads and other culinary dishes.
